description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, metallic body with a turquoise-green torso, arms, and legs, accented by deep maroon gloves, boots, and a wide belt. The head is smooth and white with a gold visor band, giving it a futuristic, helmeted appearance. The arms are extended horizontally, and the hands are rounded, matching the glossy maroon of the boots and belt. The robot's proportions are stylized, with a broad chest, narrow waist, and cylindrical limbs. The surface finish is highly reflective, suggesting a hard, polished plastic or metal exterior. There are no visible joints or seams, and the face lacks expressive features, emphasizing a streamlined, functional design.
description: A glossy, turquoise and maroon humanoid robot with a gold visor and stylized, rounded limbs. The robot has a smooth, reflective surface and a futuristic, helmeted head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's gold visor, broad chest, outstretched arms, and maroon gloves and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical profile, gold visor band, and the thickness of the maroon gloves and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the helmet, the wide maroon belt, and the symmetrical arm and leg positioning.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same cylindrical profile and color accents.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and together, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot appears to have integrated panels resembling a bodysuit with a wide belt, gloves, and boots, all in glossy, metallic finishes. No separate clothing is visible.
attribute_facial_features: The face is smooth and white with no visible mouth or nose, featuring a single gold visor band across where the eyes would be. No expressive or display elements are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: No visible joints or articulation points; limbs appear rigid and cylindrical, suggesting limited or no range of motion in the current design.
